Package org.apache.juneau.http.response

Class Accepted

java.lang.Object
org.apache.juneau.http.response.BasicHttpResponse
org.apache.juneau.http.response.Accepted
All Implemented Interfaces:
HttpResponseMessage
public class Accepted extends BasicHttpResponse
Represents an HTTP 202 Accepted response.

The request has been accepted for processing, but the processing has not been completed.

Beta — API subject to change: This type is part of the next-generation REST client and HTTP stack (org.apache.juneau.marshall.ng.*). It is not API-frozen: binary- and source-incompatible changes may appear in the next major Juneau release (and possibly earlier).

See Also:
  • juneau-ng REST client
Since:
9.2.1
